chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 2351 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2.
